compiled_state.title: EV-3: rename + alias-window the user-facing vars
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart
compiled_state.description:
## What
Rename with deprecation aliases + warnings: TICKETS_TRACKER_DIR->REBAR_TRACKER_DIR; COMPACT_THRESHOLD->REBAR_COMPACT_THRESHOLD; REBAR_ID_GUARD_MODE->REBAR_UNSAFE_ID_GUARD_BYPASS (boolean true/false default false; raise->false/warn->true; loud per-sync warning when true); REBAR_MCP_ALLOW_RECONCILE_LIVE->REBAR_MCP_ALLOW_JIRA_SYNC; REBAR_LLM_MAX_ITERS->REBAR_LLM_MAX_STEPS (clear doc); SCRATCH_BASE_DIR->REBAR_SCRATCH_BASE_DIR; REBAR_ACLI_TIMEOUT->REBAR_JIRA_CLI_TIMEOUT; REBAR_RECONCILER_LOCK_RETRY_BUDGET->REBAR_RECONCILER_LOCK_MAX_RETRIES; RECONCILER_ABSENT_GET_BUDGET->REBAR_RECONCILER_DELETION_PROBE_LIMIT.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Each renamed with old-name alias honored during deprecation window + warning
- [ ] REBAR_UNSAFE_ID_GUARD_BYPASS value-semantics flip (raise/warn -> false/true) with alias mapping + loud warning
- [ ] Docs updated; full suite green

comments.body: COMPLETE via decomposition (config-loop). All three sub-tickets closed: EV-3a [6b1b] core config-backed renames COMPACT_THRESHOLD/SCRATCH_BASE_DIR/REBAR_MCP_ALLOW_RECONCILE_LIVE (commit 06fd4d94); EV-3b [9492] TICKETS_TRACKER_DIR->REBAR_TRACKER_DIR (commit 479e4ac0); EV-3c [301b] reconciler/LLM tunables (ACLI_TIMEOUT, LOCK budget, ABSENT_GET budget, LLM_MAX_ITERS) + REBAR_ID_GUARD_MODE->REBAR_UNSAFE_ID_GUARD_BYPASS value-flip (commit 8c2c95b1). All 9 user-facing vars from the EV-3 description renamed with old-name deprecation aliases + warnings; the id-guard value-semantics flip (raise/warn->false/true) implemented with alias mapping + loud per-sync warning. All EV-3 ACs met. Full offline suite green throughout. Verify gate fail-closed preserved.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
